Site information

Contact

Use this page for corrections, feedback, or site-related discussion.

Email

Email: guan@shanyuegroup.com

Please include the page URL, surname spelling, and Chinese character if your message is about a correction.

Scope

The site can review public reference corrections, but it does not verify private family trees or personal genealogy claims.

Chinese Surname Guide

This site explains Chinese surnames, common romanizations, meanings, and origins for educational reference. It is not a genealogy verification service.
